releases.name: Winlator 7.1.3x Cmod GLIBC v11R2 - Revision - Removed Gamepad Configurator
releases.body:
Separate apk for those having issues with triggers on your controller or bindings in general. Gamepad Configurator has been disabled. 

**Added:**
-Turnip 24.3.0r9 by K1MCH11
-Box64 latest commit for FFVII Remake audio fix preinstalled (labeled as 0.3.1.4e10cd6)
-A Reset Properties button has been added to Shortcut Properties (Reset Playtime stats and Play count)
-VB 6.0 added to fix issues with installing repacks, thanks to Frost for the fix and Dark_Cobalt for the tip. It is listed in the Start Menu under Patches (unarc dependency)

**Fixed:**
-Xbox controller triggers can be bound to input controls again
-Xbox controllers will now work properly when using Trigger Is Button (Where most controls send a keycode for the triggers even with axis, Xbox One controller's do not. I now simulate a full axis press when Trigger is Button is enabled for Xbox controllers)

**Changed:**
-The apk is smaller and uses the Winlator 8.0 container pattern without crashing
-Gamepad Configurator has been disabled for the time being until I can fix issues with input processing, this should resolve issues triggers getting stuck or bindings not mapping unexpectedly.
-Memory Management has been changed back to my implementation in the proot build and will no longer cause random crashing. (Same as v11fix1)

All in all, this may be better for some people until I can fix trigger handling for Gamepad Configurator. Sometimes less is more

releases.name: Winlator 7.1.3x Cmod GLIBC v11fix1 - Big Picture Upgrade, NTSC Effect, Gamepad Configurator Beta, Gyro Revamp, Animated Wallpapers, Features and Fixes and More
releases.body:
**FIX 1 is Live, use that version or v11R2**

Winlator Cmod has a theme song! **Big shout out and thanks to my good friend Dale Melvin Blevens III (Fumer) for his exclusive track specifically for Cmod!** Yeah that's right, Big Picture Mode has default music. But hey you can set you're own as well! Customize it how you see fit. Change your wallpaper. Remap your controls! Go CRAZY

**Added:**

-Big Picture Mode has been reworked, with custom wallpaper, custom music via YouTube or Mp3, better controls with a controller, and better screen layout on larger displays. I created 3 animated wallpapers you can try out but you can also set your own. 
-Gyro Implementation Re-work: I've adjusted the sensitivity and added a pseudo calibration tool so you can get an idea of the sensitivity before you start the container. You can also remap most buttons to be your Gyro activator (L3 and R3 aren't working yet, sorry!). Great for that L1 Uncharted Golden Abyss gyro feel ;)
-Gamepad Configurator: Input Controls and Xidi isn't doing the trick? Forcefully remap your buttons to process as other buttons. This is brand new and still in beta but it's fairly useful for those games that just don't want to cooperate. You can find it in the container menu
-I've added a new NTSC Screen Effect filter for that old school CRT vibe (gamma is still broken, again, sorry!)
-The home button on Xbox and PS controllers and others will now open the Menu within Containers
-Turnip 24.3.0r7 and r8 by K1MCH11
-I've compiled Box64 3.1 on my own for Glibc with whatever latest nightly fixes are available. It's labeled as 3.2 for testing. 
**Fixes:**

**-Mice are no longer detected and considered Input Controllers, overriding your default input device and confusing applications** My favorite fix TBH
-The included DXVK 2.4.1 and others are now properly packaged and should actually improve performance in some games like Far Cry 3 and others in my testing. **Big thanks to Ajay for his guidance and providing the packages**
-VirGL should work correctly now if it wasn't before, however, I have no way to test it. 
-S̶l̶i̶g̶h̶t̶l̶y̶ ̶s̶m̶a̶l̶l̶e̶r̶ ̶A̶P̶K̶ ̶u̶s̶i̶n̶g̶ ̶W̶i̶n̶l̶a̶t̶o̶r̶ ̶8̶.̶0̶ ̶c̶o̶n̶t̶a̶i̶n̶e̶r̶ ̶p̶a̶t̶t̶e̶r̶n̶ ̶a̶n̶d̶ ̶D̶L̶L̶ ̶O̶v̶e̶r̶r̶i̶d̶e̶s̶.̶ ̶W̶o̶r̶k̶s̶ ̶w̶e̶l̶l̶ ̶b̶y̶ ̶d̶e̶f̶a̶u̶l̶t̶ ̶i̶n̶ ̶m̶y̶ ̶t̶e̶s̶t̶i̶n̶g̶
-FIX 1 Undoes this ^ it was causing hard crashes 
-Lots of things, I should have made more commits

There will be bugs, I'll be on Discord and will try to address things when I have time. And then I have to work on Proot. I'm still trying to implement MangoHud support, I've compiled it but it crashes in my testing. If anyone has guidance on understanding swapchains and vk_instance layers feel free to reach out, it's much appreciated. And as always, enjoy! 

-Alex

releases.name: Winlator 7.1.3x Cmod GLIBC v10 - Compatibility Fixes! Screen Effects! Toon Shader! Import/Export Containers! Box64 Version Switching! Bugfixes and more!
releases.body:
I've reverse engineered the new Screen Effects feature from Winlator 8.0 and added one of my own, a simple ToonShader! I'm very happy with the results. This means you now get Brightness/Contrast/Gamma controls, FXAA, and CRT screen filters as well. I've made a lot of changes to the Wine prefix, making this more of an Amod/Frost hybrid. I've also made some tweaks of my own, to fix issues with Mono and Gecko, like adding in an override for mscorre. This release also includes an offline installer for Mono and Gecko in the Runtime Libraries section of the start menu. I can't directly port over every new feature from Winlator 8.0 yet, but when Bruno releases the source code I will try my best. Which is why this remains 7.1.3. I call it 7.1.3x because it's basically a halfway point to 8.0, and still going by Longjunyu2's numbering scheme for Glibc specific changes.

However, this prefix I can guarantee a couple of major fixes, namely, no more UE4 Fatal Error for some games. Halo MCC is working! Fixes for FMV's in some titles. No more .Net warnings for new containers when Mono and Gecko are installed. I've also made a bug fixes to existing features of Cmod. I really think this is solid build. This is now a full on Frost/Amod hybrid! You'll get best results with new containers, in my experience, but start menu and prefix tweaks should still apply to existing containers to an extent. 

**Added:**
-DXVK 2.4.1 and 2.4.1-gplasync built-in
-Screen Effects (Brightness controls, FXAA, CRT) from Winlator 8.0!
-ToonShader for ScreenEffects  
-Import and Export containers! For recovering containers, or importing a friend's! 
-Box64 Version Switching for shortcuts! Ignore the "2.7" when you first open a new shortcut, it goes by preferences in Setting until you set it yourself.
-Modified custom Wine - with optimizations from Frost Glibc, but merged with Amod hybrid, resulting in what you might call, AFCMod. lol. This brings Flash Player, Windows Media Player, Registry tweaks, and other neat additions
-ReactOS App Store shortcut is now functional. TBH I didn't even know this was a thing until this week!
-Offline installers for Mono and Gecko added to "4-Runtime Libraries" in start menu. 
-Container Launching UI is adopted from Winlator 8.0

**Fixes:**
-No more UE4 Fatal Errors! Halo Master Chief Collection is working!
-Fixed Green screen for FMVs in some titles
-mscoree set to built-in then native, applied by default for new containers, correcting some issues with .net framework games and apps like HedgeModManager. Meaning, full support for Sonic Generations D3D11 Mod
-Fixed long text re-sizing for game titles in Big Picture Mode 
-Fixed issues with Frontend Export path needing to be resaved every time you close and re-open the app
-Fixed Dark Mode theme sometimes randomly switching off half-way leaving a broken light theme interface until app restart
-many other changes and tweaks that I once again can't remember...

**Still upcoming:**
-Better menu control for Big Picture Mode when using a controller
-Background music for BPM
-Custom wallpaper for BPM
-Settings changes in BPM
-Custom game icons 
-Hopefully reactive buttons for input controls from Winlator 8.0, though I may have to dissect some .smali 

The source code is not up yet, as I use it to port my changes to Proot. I will of course upload it so others can adopt in the near future! As always, let me know of bugs and things via discord or other means and I'll see what I can do! 

Import Containers:
![image](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/c211201a-d788-4923-8423-0adf8ab3c389)
Toon Shader:
![image](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/ec3a038c-1ba1-4645-a282-17c9944ef276)

releases.name: Winlator 7.1.3 Cmod Glibc v9 - Big Picture Mode, Dark Mode, and MORE
releases.body:
My biggest update by far is also the most stable. I've fixed many glitches and completely reworked turnip driver switching for shortcuts and containers, to stop all the nonsense. I've implemented the all new experimental work in progress Big Picture Mode as with Proot, as well as Dark Mode, which was the most extensive of the changes. But there are also many quality of life fixes as well, new animations for all the menus, and just overall- more stability. I think you'll find that this is release is _the_ definitive **Winlator Cmod** 

**Added:**
-Big Picture Mode with custom cover art and definable SteamGrid API Key button
-Dark Mode
-Frontend path defining
-Fullscreen Stretched Toggle
-Xinput Disabler for shortcuts
-Turnip 24.3.0r5 and 24.3.0r6 as 24.3.0.5 and 24.3.0.6 by K11MCH1
-UI Animations

**Fixed:**
-Xinput and Dinput switching for shortcuts
-TURNIP DRIVER SWITCHING FOR SHORTCUTS IS ENTIRELY REWORKED FROM THE GROUND UP
-Lots of things, so many I can't remember them all. 

There may be spots i missed in dark mode. Also if the app glitches and thinks its in light mode in dark mode, just close and re-open it. Not sure if that's just a result of debugging and restarting the activity manually or something else. I hope you enjoy, cheers to STABILITY and NEW FEATURES! 

More to come, especially for Big Picture Mode. Stay tuned!

![image](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/85779fb7-11d4-469b-8ee7-23697ea2edd8)
![image](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/bf680a8f-e48b-486c-aaec-604cc468f9a1)

releases.name: Winlator 7.1.3b Cmod PROOT v9fix1 - Big Picture Mode, Dark Mode, UI Animations, Turnip Driver Switching for Shortcuts
releases.body:
**Fix 1 is live:**
-Custom screen size text is now properly displayed in Dark Mode
-Turnip Driver Selection is now accurate based on the selection (finally)
-The navigation panel (main menu) text is now white
-The help buttons in the Box64 preset dialog are fixed

**Not fixed:**
-Input Controls changes while in-game still require you to restart the game. That will be fix2

This is a lot, I've added a "Big Picture Mode." It is accessible on the main menu via the new Screen Icon. It's essentially another Shortcuts menu that is a WIP- and sort of acts like a built-in Frontend. It's easy to use with a controller, and it will automatically download Cover Art for your Shortcut. You can also click on the image, and replace it with your own Custom Cover Art. This works using SteamGridDB's API. You can enter your own SteamGrid API Key in the Settings. If you click the Help button in Settings, you'll be taken to your SteamGrid profile where you can retrieve your key. I've also reorganized settings to clean it up into Tabs. I hope you find some use out of it! I plan to make it look nicer, add background music, fullscreen wallpaper, custom wallpaper, and more over time. 

I've also added a dark mode throughout the program. I may have missed a few spots here and there. But it's...mostly done. This can also be enabled in settings under the new Interface Tab. Other settings have been relocated to Input and Advanced. 

**Added**
-Big Picture Mode
-Dark Mode
-Turnip Driver Switching for Shortcuts
-New UI animations for all menus, slide in slide out all that
-Other things I can't remember right now

**Fixes**
-Updated Box86/Box64 versions and replaced non-working ones on Proot
-Removed Turnip 24.3.0r5 and r6 because they appear incompatible with Proot currently.
-Fixed issues with auto hide input controls and mouse input. 
-Many many backend changes and tweaks

**Upcoming**
-Hopefully all this and more on Glibc. 
-Enhancements for big picture mode, I need ideas!
-UI Tweaks
-General ideas I have for enhancements but I'm open to suggestions


Source code is not updated yet (for dark mode at least) because I need to reference modifications easily when porting to Glibc which may be a minute. 

![image](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/aa700c6e-90b6-4d35-910a-7c8046926947)
![image](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/bb938d06-eda0-49f0-b156-0a23f17da03a)

releases.name: Winlator 7.1.3b Cmod PROOT v8.2fix1 Release - Playtime Stats Tracking for Frontends, Touchscreen Controls Timeout, Touchscreen Controls Haptics
releases.body:
**Fix1 Updated 9.16.2024**

This is a minor release to add some new features I've been wanting to add for a long time, before I port them over to Glibc. 

**Added:**
-Fix1: Added Fullscreen Stretched toggle for shortcuts and containers 
-Playtime Stats tracking and Play count are now tracked when launched via Intent (Homescreen Shortcuts / Frontend support!)
-A timeout checkbox has been added to input controls when in-game, adding a 5 second timer to the touchscreen controls 
-Haptic Feedback is now enabled for Touchscreen buttons, and can also be enabled via a new checkbox in the input controls window while in-game 

**Fixed:**
-Fix1: Fixed issue with touchscreen cursor unusable until confirming input controls dialog
-Fix1: Fixed issue where cursor was hidden when opening the XServer menu while in Wine
-Fix1: Enabled haptics for analog stick digital buttons, d-pad and others 


As always, please let me know if there are bugs. I'll do my best to address them one at a time!

releases.name: Winlator 7.1.3 Cmod GLIBC v8.5fix1 - Shortcut Cloning, Playtime Stats tracking for Frontends, Touchscreen Controls Timeout and Haptic Feedback
releases.body:
**Fix1 is live**

Minor release to add some useful QoL features, ported from my latest Proot release. As always, let me know if you encounter any bugs and whatnot but nothing else major has changed.


**Added:**
-Clone Shortcuts between Containers! This will create a duplicate Shortcut with an identical file name and a new container ID in the destination container. Useful for a fresh start for a specific game and no need to boot into the new container on it's own.
-Playtime stats and play count tracking is now enabled for Homescreen Shortcuts and Frontend launching!
-A timeout for the touchscreen controls has been added. This will auto hide the touchscreen controls after 5 seconds. To disable it, make sure it is unchecked and restart the shortcut.
-Haptic feedback for all touchscreen control buttons has been added and can be enabled via check box 

**Fixed:**
-Fix1:  Fixed issue with touchscreen cursor unusable until confirming input controls dialog

releases.name: Winlator 7.1.3 Cmod GLIBC v8fix2 - Turnip Driver Switching Fixes for Shortcuts
releases.body:
**Fixed:**
-Fixed issue where Turnip driver reset upon opening Shortcut Settings for Shortcuts
-Fixed issue where Container driver selection was overridden by the Shortcut Turnip driver selection

**Added:**
-Selected Turnip Version is now displayed in Shortcut settings (NOTE: This won't update until you save the Shortcut)
-Including Ajay's Wine 9.13 .wcp file with this release (fixes booting Metal Gear Solid: Ground Zeroes v1.0.5)

releases.name: Winlator 7.1.3 Cmod GLIBC v8fix1 - Release - The Amod Hybrid, Bug fixes and more...
releases.body:
**I am resurrected.**
I finally have an account again but properly pushing this branch after moving from a different branch from a different repo was quite confusing, and I'm still pretty new to all of this. Keep in mind, this is a major shift from Glibc Cmod v8 Alpha if you've used that, with an entirely new Wine Prefix, meaning- existing containers WILL be affected in my testing. I recommend clearing the cache on existing container, using the reconfigure option if you encounter errors. You will have best results with a new container, again, in my testing. If you're worried about losing your current configuration, well now is that perfect time make a backup ;)

Uninstall of official or other Glibc Winlator forks is still required as this uses the Official package name com.winlator (it is a hard coded path)

**Standard Cmod Features**
True Mouse Control, Xinput Disabler, Touchscreen Mode, Basic Stylus Support, Gyro Support, Frontend Support, Playtime Stats Tracking per Shortcut, Saves Manager, and all other existing Glibc features such as Longjunyu2's Contents Manager and Box64rc Files + Midi Support

**Added:**
-Turnip 24.3.0r4 by K11MCHI (24.3.0.4 in-app)
-Latest DXVK 2.4.1 gplasync
-New Wine Prefix, 9.2 Custom from Afei but modded for English, includes nearly all features from Afei's build (Winlator 7.1.3 Glibc Fix3 - Except for commands for TU_DEBUG and pre-installed Contents). This means hopefully a performance boost. I've also found this fixes the font and handling of applications that use .net and prevents a black screen in many cases where Gecko/Mono is involved!
-7.1.2 Legacy Input mode (Longjunyu2's 7.1.2 xinput dlls plus the same key mapping method, it _might_ be useful)
-New Start Menu shortcuts like DOSBOX, restored WFM, added all Turnip drivers per Afei's 
-Added End key per Longjunyu2
-Zink for all Turnip Drivers
-Graphics Driver Switching per Shortcut but that was in Alpha, it just more stable now
-Fully functioning Picture in Picture mode
-Spaces in Paths for New Tasks via Task Manager or Secondary Executables when enclosed in quotations (i.e "D:\Games\My Game\My Game.exe")
-Other minor features I can't remember because I've not been able to easily track my progress without a GitHub... go figure

**Fixes:**
_-Fix1: Issue with Custom Screen Size box not appearing in Container Settings is resolved_ 
-Gyro Default behavior bug is resolved
-No more crashing when renaming Shortcuts
-Better Turnip Driver shortcut switching (significantly less crashes when making changes)
-Many scroll window fixes when using a mouse
-Fixed (?) issue with binding analog sticks in Input Controls (still needs testing)
-Fixed issue with Esc key opening XServerView menu on some devices (needs testing)
-Many other minor bug fixes...

**In the works:**
-Try to fix bindings for some devices like Odin's back button and 'N' key in Input Controls for some devices
-Haptic for touchscreen mode
-Playtime stats tracking for shortcuts is still on my radar
-I'd like to include that Vulkan frame limiter a certain Arkha mentioned to me
-Path selection for Frontend exports (just as it is in the Proot build) 
-Gyro activation button selection, better Gyro Calibration settings

releases.name: Winlator 7.1.3b Cmod PROOT v8fix1 Release - I'm back! Backup and restore, dinput / xinput switching, secondary executables, Frontend Export path changes and lots more...
releases.body:
**Fixed:**
Corrected issue with gyro enabled by default despite the check box in settings stating otherwise 

**Added:**
Backported most Cmod Glibc features to Proot (many thanks Longjunyu2)
Xinput Dinput Switching
Added latest DXVK + Turnip 24.3.0 R4 by K11MCHI 
Reinstall ImageFS, Backup/Restore Added
English by Default
LC_ALL Toggle
Frontend Export Path defining and other tweaks to Frotend loading
Secondary executable loading for Shortcuts
Fixed issue with loading Box64 and Wine via Contents Manager installs
Fixed issue with Turnip Driver switching for containers
Fully working Picture in Picture mode

**Cmod Features Remain the same:**
True Mouse Control
Xinput Disabler
Gyro Controls
Touchscreen mode
Home screen shortcuts
Frontend Support
Playtime Stats Tracking

**Upcoming:**
Working on trying to add better PulseAudio/ALSA handling for incoming calls
More tweaks to Frontend loading
Some fixes for controller bindings for certain devices
OpenXR additions to be ported from Glibc build
Still trying to get playtime stats tracking for Frontend and homescreen launching

Many more minor updates and fixes since I have not been able to make commits since my Github was just restored

releases.name: Wine staging 10.15 (WOW64 with Vulkan & GStreamer for Termux)
releases.body:
# Wine staging 10.15 - WOW64 with Vulkan & GStreamer for Termux

## 版本信息
- **Wine 分支**: staging
- **Wine 版本**: 10.15
- **架构**: True WOW64 (同时支持 32 位和 64 位 Windows 应用程序)
- **平台**: Termux (Android)
- **图形 API**: Vulkan 支持已启用
- **多媒体**: 完整 GStreamer 支持

## 特性
✓ 真正的 WOW64 架构
✓ 同时支持 32 位和 64 位 Windows 应用程序
✓ Vulkan 图形 API 支持
✓ 完整的 GStreamer 支持
✓ 中文环境支持
✓ 应用了关键补丁提升兼容性

## 安装说明
解压后，将 `wine-wine-10.15-72dc2afb1a7-staging-wow64` 文件夹放置在 Termux 的合适位置，并设置环境变量。

## 构建信息
- 构建时间: 
- 提交: 47f15cb0b6754b22914cbd83fa504fd58c9a7f7f
- 工作流: Wine and Proton 无bootBuilder

releases.name: Proton proton_10.0 (WOW64 with Vulkan & GStreamer for Termux - xuser)
releases.body:
# Proton proton_10.0 - WOW64 with Vulkan & GStreamer for Termux (xuser)

## 版本信息
- **Proton 分支**: proton_10.0
- **架构**: True WOW64 (同时支持 32 位和 64 位 Windows 应用程序)
- **平台**: Termux (Android)
- **图形 API**: Vulkan 支持已启用
- **多媒体**: 完整 GStreamer 支持
- **用户名**: xuser (已移除 Steam 优化)

## 特性
✓ 真正的 WOW64 架构
✓ 同时支持 32 位和 64 位 Windows 应用程序
✓ Vulkan 图形 API 支持
✓ 完整的 GStreamer 支持
✓ 中文环境支持
✓ 基于 Valve Proton，但移除了 Steam 特定优化
✓ 默认用户名改为 xuser

## 重要变更
- 所有对 `steamuser` 的引用已改为 `xuser`
- 移除了 Steam 特定的优化和组件
- 更适合通用 Windows 应用程序运行

## 安装说明
解压后，将 `proton-proton-wine-10.0-4-b8fdff8e1f8-wow64-xuser` 文件夹放置在 Termux 的合适位置，并设置环境变量。

## 构建信息
- 构建时间: 
- 提交: c139ecff7e39b1a0e194826fccf83496e3dbbfa9
- 工作流: Wine and Proton 无bootBuilder

releases.name: 7.1.3glibc-Amod
releases.body:
原版更新重要内容，以及Amod内容:
~~~~增加了MIDI支持，允许部分游戏播放 MIDI 音频
~~~~改进了游戏控制器支持，您现在可以选择性地使用XInput或DInput映射。线性触发器现在适用于两种 
       映射模式。对于触发器按钮，如果它无法正常工作，请尝试调整触发器按钮模式以Settings匹配您的控 
      制器。
~~~~增加了自动设置容器Locale的功能，现在您也可以LC_ALL在容器编辑界面中调整设置。
~~~~增加了横屏和竖屏模式切换功能，现在您可以使用容器的分辨率设置或Toggle Orientation左侧导航栏 
       的按钮切换到竖屏模式。
~~~~改进了OpenXR支持。非常感谢Luboš V.
~~~~修复了导致启动时崩溃的问题。
~~~~修复 3DoF 支持以确保其正常运行，而不是在 2DoF 模式下运行。
~~~~修复了 Meta Quest 3 的一些图形故障。
~~~~在设置中添加了控制器映射功能。
~~~~修复了QuestOS V69上的黑屏问题。
~~~~添加了 gst-libav。

Amod更改内容:
~~~~默认wine9.2，以及wine9.16
~~~~关于gst解码。9.2比较完善，9.16目前没有画面只有声音！
~~~~添加dosbox模拟器！使用方法大概是盘符(比如e:)回车，cd 游戏文件夹，play回车！
~~~~添加更多小游戏和补丁
~~~~添加更多dxvk和驱动，box64等
~~~~添加media补丁和注册表听说可以解决生化危机8
~~~~添加部分变量，比如tu_allow_oob_indirect_ubo_loads和PULSE_LATENCY_MSEC
~~~~添加box64maxcpu，分为0-4-8-16-32
~~~~更改部分默认组件和其他设置
~~~~提供sw选项，
~~~~提供tu-debug另一个指令nofsdt，部分游戏会有提速！
~~~~添加更多虚拟按键皮肤图标！
~~~~其他部分更改！

mod内容
修改额外内容安装目录，方便mod用户二次修改整合

修复中文右键出现口口口的问题

此次更新较多，可能存在一些问题，还请等待改版作者"如果我是linus"的下次更新
等等

releases.name: v1.1.0
releases.body:
## Downloads
- **`gamenative-v1.1.0.apk`** — Standard build (Android 8–14). Recommended for most users.
- **`gamenative-v1.1.0-xr.apk`** — Quest/VR sideload build. Legacy storage with all-files access and D drive support, forced landscape. Sideload only (not for the store).


## What's Changed
Added since prerelease:
* ASR: rename lib, add fence and color format conversion to prevent surfaceflinger crash by @AndreVto in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/1620
* fix Steam in China: javasteam query params handling by @joshuatam in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/1652
* Fix: Clear needs unpack flag for non-steam games (fixes constant mono install) by @Catpotatos in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/1638
* fix: GOG cloud save upload to prevent redundant transfers by @joshuatam in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/1637
* Added changes to make app more navigable by controller in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/1646
* apply gmem automatically for adreno 710, 720, 732 to reduce glitches in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/1656
* Updated Steam/Epic/GOG notifications to correctly show background download notification in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/1621
* Added default turnip driver for A12 devices (Retroid Pocket Classic) in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/1647
* Added back delete container for installed games in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/1648
* Prevent audio resume when exiting from QuickMenu that caused ANR by @joshuatam in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/1635
* Fix recently played library sort by @xXJSONDeruloXx in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/1509
* Fixed brightness manager in quick action menu by @xXJSONDeruloXx in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/1623
* Add missing strings across all languages by @VinceBT in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/1625

From prerelease:
- Added more granular device compatibility data so you know which games will work well on your device in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/1568
- Massive improvements to Pulse audio - now reliable and low-latency by @joshuatam in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/1574
- Added SurfaceFlinger renderer option - reduces latency, increases FPS by @AndreVto (based off @StevenMXZ's work) in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/1582
- Massive improvements to Bionic Steam Client - now works reliably for DRM, online connection, DLC - but only on Proton 10, and online play may not always work
- Stopped infinite "Handling DRM" bug in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/1575
- Fixed usb storage not being detected in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/1585
- Added hero image to booting splash screen by @xXJSONDeruloXx in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/1587
- Fix slowdowns faced when using onscreen controller by @Nightwalker743 in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/1592
- Created build for Quest in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/1580
- Fix Slay the Spire workshop mod launching by @Nightwalker743 in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/1589
- Add custom games user-supplied cover image support by @Catpotatos in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/1494
- Make driver and DXVK lists searchable by @Smithsonian1974 in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/1558
- Fixed case-sensitive cloud saves (eg Disco Elysium for Epic Games) by @phobos665 & me in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/1598
- Fixed GOG cloud saves for games that don't have client id like Dead Cells in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/1596
- fix: handle steam 0B depot download (fix recent update of Vampire Survivors DLC) by @joshuatam in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/1590
- Fixed games that stopped working in v0.9.2: removed 2022 vcredists from preinstall steps in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/1571
- Allow reusing active games from frontend instead of launching new ones in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/1605
- Added gamefix for subnautica 2 in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/1572
- Fixed several app not responding issues by @joshuatam in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/1603
- add How Long To Beat stats strip to game pages by @xXJSONDeruloXx in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/1282
- Fix keyboard Esc quick menu shortcut by @Nightwalker743 in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/1532
- Fix: add Exynos HUD fallbacks by @xXJSONDeruloXx in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/1573
- feat: Add QAM display brightness control by @xXJSONDeruloXx in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/1525
- Add Hold Mouse Button While Touching gesture option by @Nightwalker743 in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/1513
- Add relative touchscreen drag movement option by @Nightwalker743 in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/1544
- Fix shooter mode touch-side joystick routing by @Nightwalker743 in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/1534
- fix: steamservice crash on pic requests by @joshuatam in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/1548
- feat: custom game import as Steam based on PrefManager toggle in Settings by @phobos665 in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/1531
- Allow installation of full steam client after bionic client is enabled in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/1552
- Updated winhandler and evshim to fix freezes in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/1553
- feat: Improve Epic game download performance and reliability by @joshuatam in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/1554
- fix: pulseaudio always extract, update apache-compress version by @joshuatam in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/1556
- Allow ad-hoc signed builds of PRs by number in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/1561
- fix: allow scrcpy motion event to move mouse by @AndreVto in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/1567
- Fix installs on fresh SD cards in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/1594
- Add DXVK sarek 1.12.0 by @Catpotatos in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/1588
- fix(l10n): complete Korean localization by @sampple-korea in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/1559
- Return empty defaults when ImageFs metadata files exist but are empty by @Smuger in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/1565
- Fixed capsule art for GOG games in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/1597
- Add touchscreen keyboard and inverted pan actions by @Nightwalker743 in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/1522
- Repeat physical controller scroll bindings while held by @Nightwalker743 in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/1602
- Fix: Adding custom games from USB OTG drives silently fails by @sam1am in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/1520
- Add dinput override by @raynoxu1337 in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/1495
- Fix Exit Game ANR from rumble futex teardown race by @Nightwalker743 in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/1607

## New Contributors
* @sampple-korea made their first contribution in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/1559
* @Smuger made their first contribution in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/1565
* @Smithsonian1974 made their first contribution in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/1558
* @sam1am made their first contribution in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/1520
* @raynoxu1337 made their first contribution in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/1495
* @VinceBT made their first contribution in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/1625

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/compare/v1.0.0...v1.1.0

releases.name: v1.0.0
releases.body:
## Downloads
- **`gamenative-v1.0.0.apk`** — Standard build (Android 8–14). Recommended for most users.

## What's Changed

### Added after prerelease
* fixed controller not working on glibc + other controller issues by @AndreVto in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/1502
* Update default configs for devices so more games work out of the box by @utkarshdalal in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/1521
* fixes for bionic steam client (remove crashes) by @joshuatam in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/1505
* Fix Darkest Dungeon Workshop mod handling by @Nightwalker743 in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/1500
* Improve game pause/resume timing and synchronization by @joshuatam in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/1506
* Add ALT + ENTER control action by @Nightwalker743 in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/1498
* Add more variable preset suggestions by @Catpotatos in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/1497
* fix Vulkan renderer scaling/screen effects by @xXJSONDeruloXx in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/1503 and me
* Fix: Long exe game names not SIGSTOPed due to getting truncate by @Catpotatos in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/1496
* preserve zip payload extensions for Steam workshop by @Nightwalker743 in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/1523
* fix: update pulseaudio suspend/resume handling by @joshuatam in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/1527

### From prerelease
* Brought in Vulkan Renderer from Winlator Ludashi (thank you @stevenmxz) - improves performance and input latency
* Updated controller implementation by @AndreVto - improves performance and input latency in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/1471
* Improvements to LSFG-vk framegen - should work more reliably. @xXJSONDeruloXx brought in lsfg-vk Android layer v1.0.2
* Added modern build of GameNative app for latest version of Android - for Play Store release
* Added beta bionic Steam implementation for online play with no Steam client overhead (back up your saves before using it) - by @joshuatam and me
* Updated controller implementation - fixes Kingdom Hearts 1.5 + 2.5 ReMIX by @AndreVto 
* Several pulse audio fixes, reduced latency, reliably pause and resume by @joshuatam 
* Improve perf HUD temperature sensor accuracy and GPU usage coverage by @xXJSONDeruloXx in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/1406
* Automatic frontend sync for installed/uninstalled games by @vitormf in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/1454
* Fix: Stuck loading screen during Mono/XAudio install by @Catpotatos in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/1395
* Improve shortcut icons - use clientIcon instead of icon for steam shortcuts by @Raxcoms in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/1402
* Faster boots - cache Steam save file hashes between syncs by @kiequoo in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/1227
* Fix steam playtime not being tracked after sleeping the device or going offline - resend steam presence after reconnect by @xXJSONDeruloXx in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/1278
* Cap Steam DL size to installSize to avoid gigantic dl size reporting. by @phobos665 in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/1482
* Allow sign in with Steam Guard TOTP code by @peanut250 in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/1241
* Fixed stylus handling in TouchpadView by @ppsz in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/1334
* Steam cloud save fix - Two Point Museum works by @kiequoo in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/1465
* Epic Offline Mode for offline launches by @phobos665 in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/1467
* Fixed Steam games showing account name instead of user name by @utkarshdalal in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/1492
* Fix games sometimes continuing to run threads in background when paused and eating battery by @Catpotatos in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/1491
* Fix simultaneous dpad and left stick input by @Nightwalker743 in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/1445
* Fix range button scrolling in touchmode by @Nightwalker743 in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/1446
* Fix touchscreen click-drag cursor tracking by @Nightwalker743 in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/1449
* Fix hold gesture mouse click timing by @Nightwalker743 in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/1450
* fix: clear persona state and hide status picker on sign out by @ben-pearson in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/1312
* Show remaining storage space in Storage Manager by @ben-pearson in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/1321
* fix: Exclude custom games from compatibility filter by @joshuatam in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/1412
* chore: fexcore-2605 by @phobos665 and @linkq in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/1422
* don't block local launch when remote runs a non-Steam shortcut by @ben-pearson in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/1396
* fix: update child windows when parent geometry is changed by @AndreVto in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/1436
* Fix graphics glitches - Remove TU_DEBUG=deck_emu default. by @phobos665 in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/1481
* fix: add Korean and Romanian to language switcher, sort by ISO code by @linkq in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/1349
* i18n: extract booting splash tips into translatable string resources by @linkq in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/1350
* Fix RenPy workshop mod duplication by @Ivantyaj in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/1394
* fix: add game fix for Danganronpa 2 (STEAM 413420) by @tlt21 in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/1301
* fix(envvars): escape spaces on round-trip; fix crash on save by @jeremybernstein in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/1429
* sync offline achievements on reconnect by @xXJSONDeruloXx in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/1268
* fix: Cleanup/remove unused functions etc. by @phobos665 in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/1362
* Japanese translation by @utkarshdalal in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/1475
* fix: Improve process handling for reliable suspend/resume by @joshuatam in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/1457
* fix: Pause and resume PerformanceHudView with lifecycle by @joshuatam in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/1463
* Attempted added support for USB external storage by @utkarshdalal in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/1476
* fix Steam ForegroundServiceDidNotStartInTimeException crash by @phobos665 in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/1485
* fix Steam achievement timestamps by @phobos665 in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/1473
* fix(steam/download): close race that hangs Update/Verify at 0% by @jeremybernstein in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/1434

## New Contributors

* @Ivantyaj made their first contribution in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/1394
* @ppsz made their first contribution in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/1334
* @peanut250 made their first contribution in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/1241
* @vitormf made their first contribution in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/1454

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/compare/v0.9.2...v1.0.0

releases.name: v1.0.0-prerelease
releases.body:
## Downloads
- **`gamenative-v1.0.0-prerelease.apk`** — Legacy build (Android 8–14). Recommended for most users.
- **`gamenative-v1.0.0-prerelease-modern.apk`** — Modern build (Android 11+). Built for the latest Android, so **no security warning** about an outdated target. No D drive access and no custom game support; glibc not supported, external storage location moved.

releases.name: v0.9.2
releases.body:
## What's Changed
* Revert multicontroller support, fix controller issues on 0.9.1
* Epic denuvo support, Hogwarts Legacy working (requires sign out of Epic and back in)
* Correct half-texel offset in FSR RCAS sampling by @xXJSONDeruloXx in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/1386
* Ensure single-depot DLCs are not filtered by language (fixes Skyrim in Japanese) by @joshuatam in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/1398
* Exclude Steam China depots from download consideration (fixes Eastw ard in Chinese), requires log out and log inof Steam by @joshuatam in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/1399
* Fixed games showing as 0B if deleted from storage manager, fixed Resume button, other downloading improvements
* Fix disabled mouse in Glibc - allow XI2 only on bionic container by @AndreVto in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/1389


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/compare/v0.9.1...v0.9.2

releases.name: v0.9.1
releases.body:
## What's Changed

### Added since prerelease
* LSFG-VK frame generation integration by @xXJSONDeruloXx in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/1322
* Fixes for games not appearing, DLC not appearing and some games showing as 0B.
* Fixes for offline launches via frontends by @jeremybernstein in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/1283
* Fixes for frame rate cap, task manager, FSR fit scaling mode to preserve container aspect ration by @xXJSONDeruloXx
* let XI2 throw error on unimplemented opcode (lets EA app install) by @AndreVto in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/1354
* Proton symlink fixes by @unbelievableflavour

### From v0.9.1-prerelease
* Added support for Epic EOS DRM and online play (by @phobos665 and me) in #1285
* Added multi-controller support by @bllendev in #1047
* Update wine-mono version to 11.0.0 in installer scripts, fixes online play for some games by @Catpotatos in #1133
* Eliminate random container corruption and wine prefix overwrites by @Catpotatos and me in #1310
* Fixed bug when local Steam saves could be overwritten after playing offline and going online by @jeremybernstein in #1169
* Significant fixes to Steam cloud saves where game had no UFS preset by @joshuatam in #1100
* Multicontroller support by @bllendev in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/1261
* Added Ludashi's/Gamehub's HDR (aka "Vivid mode") by @xXJSONDeruloXx in #1106
* Added FSR 1.0 & Scaling Modes by @xXJSONDeruloXx in #1112
* Eliminated infinite booting screens by @jeremybernstein in #1136
* Fixed bug introduced in 0.9.0 hiding Steam games and DLC, enhance DLC display by @joshuatam in #1191
* Fixed bug introduced in 0.9.0 where redists were not downloaded for Steam games by @joshuatam in #1166
* Added GameNative's new custom proton 10 builds by @AndreVto , @joshuatam in #1275
* Made both Epic and GOG downloads from Asia in #1220
* Massive improvements to touchscreen mode and gestures by @Nightwalker743 in #1276
* Fixed audio in games like Skyrim by automatically extracting XAudio DLLs in Proton 10 by @joshuatam in #1184
* Made layouts cutout/notch aware in #1299
* Reduce Application Error 0000065432 by making Unpack Files more aggressive in #1300
* Fix mouse movement in games that use raw mouse input and clipcursor by @AndreVto in #1084
* Add ability to import Steam games via custom paths by @joshuatam in #1066
* Added ability to manually set location for workshop mods by @Nightwalker743 in #1072
* Added task manager in sidebar by @xXJSONDeruloXx in #1121
* Added dialog for known configs with missing components rather than failing silently by @jeremybernstein in #801
* added in-game FPS clamp for quick performance adjustments by @xXJSONDeruloXx in #1081
* Added toggle to enable/disable showing achievements by @phobos665 in #1251
* Add Steam save import and export actions by @xXJSONDeruloXx in #966
* Added fexcore 2604 by @xXJSONDeruloXx in #1170
* Added Box64 0.4.2 by @phobos665 in #1262
* Added new turnip drivers for 8 Elite and 7xx/6xx (26.2.0, fixes UE5 DX12 games) to manifest by @utkarshdalal in #1263
* Added toggle to disable Posthog analytics by @utkarshdalal in #1236
* Added optional in-app game recommendations page by @utkarshdalal in #1235
* Show actionable dialog when Steam session is taken by another device instead of silent crash by @ben-pearson in #1306
* Fixed some Steam games showing container desktop on press play by @kiequoo in #1198
* Fix wrong install size showing for some games by @jeremybernstein in #1054
* Fix Steam cloud saves with unhandled UFS path types and fix save pattern parsing edge cases by @kiequoo in #1157
* Preserve file timestamps during Steam Cloud download by @joshuatam in #1199
* Sync cloud saves immediately after install by @kiequoo in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/1264

And many more:

* fix: prevent carousel touch loss during pagination by @xXJSONDeruloXx in #1127
* fix: Download support files for gen 2 by @unbelievableflavour in #1130
* gamefix: Added wine env var fix type + fix for stardew by @unbelievableflavour in #1156
* Empty Wine/XDG trash on container shutdown by @jeremybernstein in #1151
* fix: Added additional directory for xna msi by @unbelievableflavour in #1125
* fix: match UFS save file globs case-insensitively by @AnikethanVA in #1183
* feat: Added force cloud sync for GOG + made toasts consistent across platforms by @unbelievableflavour in #812
* Fix library view not updating after game uninstall by @jeremybernstein in #956
* Fix connection banner visibility and slow disconnect detection by @jeremybernstein in #918
* Add reusable INI game fix for Imperivm by @Misazam in #1009
* feat: disable IME extract UI and centralize singleLine keyboard behavior by @jeremybernstein in #1014
* fix: perf hud fps fix for other wrappers by @xXJSONDeruloXx in #1164
* feat: Added option to toggle button hints bar by @unbelievableflavour in #811
* Fix: GOG chunk URL broken when CDN token is in query string by @unbelievableflavour in #1215
* fix: skip spurious conflict when cache wiped but local matches cloud by @jeremybernstein in #1228
* chore(): openApi specs for Gog, Epic & Amazon by @phobos665 in #1234
* gamefix: More fallout game fixes by @unbelievableflavour in #1134
* gamefix: Kingdom hearts 3 (epic) gamefix by @unbelievableflavour in #1161
* fix: kill stale wine processes before launch by @xXJSONDeruloXx in #1195
* fix: GOG cloud save fetch failure handling by @kiequoo in #1201
* feat: Parallelize Steam cloud save downloads by @kiequoo in #1226
* fix: use stored installPath in GOGManager.deleteGame to prevent uninstall failures by @xXJSONDeruloXx in #1255
* Added some changes for rockstar launcher by @utkarshdalal in #1274
* feat/refactor: Improve GOGDownloadManager download efficiency by @joshuatam in #1277
* fix(workshop): force standard Steam UGC path for Tale of Immortal by @linkq in #1260
* Move Touchscreen Mode toggle to in-game sidebar by @Nightwalker743 in #1249
* fix: late release single tap in touchscreen mode to fix clicking in some games by @AndreVto in #1212
* fix: gog download pause / resume handling logic by @joshuatam in #1291
* fix: resolve cloud save path for Danganronpa 2 (app 413420) by @tlt21 in #1297
* Fix: Rounded corners being clipped as rectangles in CompactLibraryTabBar by @sdkahal in #1293
* feat: move Disable Mouse Input to in-game Quick Menu overlay by @ben-pearson in #1267
* fix: keep exit button visible on ultrawide phones by making tab rail scrollable by @xXJSONDeruloXx in #1307
* i18n: update and complete Chinese localizations (zh_CN & zh_TW) by @sdkahal in #1315
* feat: add Show Keyboard extra binding to control editor by @Nightwalker743 in #1271
* fix: Meta Quest 3/3s black screen on Turnip driver by @lvonasek in #1185
* gamefix: Added jazz jack collection args fix by @unbelievableflavour in #1131
* fix: persist screen effects settings per game by @xXJSONDeruloXx in #1108
* refactor: Symlink imagefs_shared home in the variants + migrate old home contents by @unbelievableflavour in #1030
* fix: Missing X11 keysym entries for Num and Caps Lock keys by @Unnvaldr in #1149
* fix: eliminate global symlink dependency in PathType.toAbsPath by @kiequoo in #1305
* Added slay the spire 2 gamefix by @unbelievableflavour in #1160
* Refactor: Moved all gamefixes to gamefixes/types for clear structure by @unbelievableflavour in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/1217
* fix/feat: allow config dxvk and vkd3d version together by @joshuatam in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/1083
* fix(workshop): skip ZIP extraction for games that read archives directly by @linkq in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/1316
* refactor: Symlink imagefs_shared proton in the variants + migrate old proton versions by @unbelievableflavour in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/1034

## New Contributors
* @AnikethanVA made their first contribution in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/1183
* @Misazam made their first contribution in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/1009
* @bllendev made their first contribution in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/1047
* @linkq made their first contribution in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/1260
* @tlt21 made their first contribution in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/1297
* @sdkahal made their first contribution in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/1293
* @ben-pearson made their first contribution in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/1267

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/compare/v0.9.0...v0.9.1

* Added dialog for known configs with missing components rather than failing silently by @jeremybernstein in #801
* added in-game FPS clamp for quick performance adjustments by @xXJSONDeruloXx in #1081
* Added toggle to enable/disable showing achievements by @phobos665 in #1251
* Add Steam save import and export actions by @xXJSONDeruloXx in #966
* Added fexcore 2604 by @xXJSONDeruloXx in #1170
* Added Box64 0.4.2 by @phobos665 in #1262
* Added new turnip drivers for 8 Elite and 7xx/6xx (26.2.0, fixes UE5 DX12 games) to manifest by @utkarshdalal in #1263
* Added toggle to disable Posthog analytics by @utkarshdalal in #1236
* Added optional in-app game recommendations page by @utkarshdalal in #1235
* Show actionable dialog when Steam session is taken by another device instead of silent crash by @ben-pearson in #1306
* Fixed some Steam games showing container desktop on press play by @kiequoo in #1198
* Fix wrong install size showing for some games by @jeremybernstein in #1054
* Fix Steam cloud saves with unhandled UFS path types and fix save pattern parsing edge cases by @kiequoo in #1157
* Preserve file timestamps during Steam Cloud download by @joshuatam in #1199
* Sync cloud saves immediately after install by @kiequoo in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/1264

And many more:

* fix: prevent carousel touch loss during pagination by @xXJSONDeruloXx in #1127
* fix: Download support files for gen 2 by @unbelievableflavour in #1130
* gamefix: Added wine env var fix type + fix for stardew by @unbelievableflavour in #1156
* Empty Wine/XDG trash on container shutdown by @jeremybernstein in #1151
* fix: Added additional directory for xna msi by @unbelievableflavour in #1125
* fix: match UFS save file globs case-insensitively by @AnikethanVA in #1183
* feat: Added force cloud sync for GOG + made toasts consistent across platforms by @unbelievableflavour in #812
* Fix library view not updating after game uninstall by @jeremybernstein in #956
* Fix connection banner visibility and slow disconnect detection by @jeremybernstein in #918
* Add reusable INI game fix for Imperivm by @Misazam in #1009
* feat: disable IME extract UI and centralize singleLine keyboard behavior by @jeremybernstein in #1014
* fix: perf hud fps fix for other wrappers by @xXJSONDeruloXx in #1164
* feat: Added option to toggle button hints bar by @unbelievableflavour in #811
* Fix: GOG chunk URL broken when CDN token is in query string by @unbelievableflavour in #1215
* fix: skip spurious conflict when cache wiped but local matches cloud by @jeremybernstein in #1228
* chore(): openApi specs for Gog, Epic & Amazon by @phobos665 in #1234
* gamefix: More fallout game fixes by @unbelievableflavour in #1134
* gamefix: Kingdom hearts 3 (epic) gamefix by @unbelievableflavour in #1161
* fix: kill stale wine processes before launch by @xXJSONDeruloXx in #1195
* fix: GOG cloud save fetch failure handling by @kiequoo in #1201
* feat: Parallelize Steam cloud save downloads by @kiequoo in #1226
* fix: use stored installPath in GOGManager.deleteGame to prevent uninstall failures by @xXJSONDeruloXx in #1255
* Added some changes for rockstar launcher by @utkarshdalal in #1274
* feat/refactor: Improve GOGDownloadManager download efficiency by @joshuatam in #1277
* fix(workshop): force standard Steam UGC path for Tale of Immortal by @linkq in #1260
* Move Touchscreen Mode toggle to in-game sidebar by @Nightwalker743 in #1249
* fix: late release single tap in touchscreen mode to fix clicking in some games by @AndreVto in #1212
* fix: gog download pause / resume handling logic by @joshuatam in #1291
* fix: resolve cloud save path for Danganronpa 2 (app 413420) by @tlt21 in #1297
* Fix: Rounded corners being clipped as rectangles in CompactLibraryTabBar by @sdkahal in #1293
* feat: move Disable Mouse Input to in-game Quick Menu overlay by @ben-pearson in #1267
* fix: keep exit button visible on ultrawide phones by making tab rail scrollable by @xXJSONDeruloXx in #1307
* i18n: update and complete Chinese localizations (zh_CN & zh_TW) by @sdkahal in #1315
* feat: add Show Keyboard extra binding to control editor by @Nightwalker743 in #1271
* fix: Meta Quest 3/3s black screen on Turnip driver by @lvonasek in #1185
* gamefix: Added jazz jack collection args fix by @unbelievableflavour in #1131
* fix: persist screen effects settings per game by @xXJSONDeruloXx in #1108
* refactor: Symlink imagefs_shared home in the variants + migrate old home contents by @unbelievableflavour in #1030
* fix: Missing X11 keysym entries for Num and Caps Lock keys by @Unnvaldr in #1149
* fix: eliminate global symlink dependency in PathType.toAbsPath by @kiequoo in #1305
* Added slay the spire 2 gamefix by @unbelievableflavour in #1160
* Refactor: Moved all gamefixes to gamefixes/types for clear structure by @unbelievableflavour in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/1217
* fix/feat: allow config dxvk and vkd3d version together by @joshuatam in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/1083
* fix(workshop): skip ZIP extraction for games that read archives directly by @linkq in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/1316
* refactor: Symlink imagefs_shared proton in the variants + migrate old proton versions by @unbelievableflavour in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/1034

## New Contributors
* @AnikethanVA made their first contribution in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/1183
* @Misazam made their first contribution in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/1009
* @bllendev made their first contribution in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/1047
* @linkq made their first contribution in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/1260
* @tlt21 made their first contribution in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/1297
* @sdkahal made their first contribution in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/1293
* @ben-pearson made their first contribution in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/1267

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/compare/v0.9.0...v0.9.1-prerelease

releases.name: v0.9.0
releases.body:
## What's Changed

Fixes since prerelease:
* Fix touchpad right-click by @Nightwalker743 in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/1071
* fix: remove 30s brightness blackout from ambient download overlay by @xXJSONDeruloXx in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/1086
* add OpenAL Soft Audio support, added presets for WINEDLLOVERRIDES for Quick Audio fixing by @Catpotatos in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/1102
* BCN emulation was hidden from Proton x86_x64 by @Catpotatos in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/1109
* Fix old installs for storage mgr by @xXJSONDeruloXx in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/1111
* Handle store-specific best configs by @utkarshdalal in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/1115
* Reduce GC pressure in CaseInsensitiveFileSystem by @jeremybernstein in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/1120
* Fix crash on game start on Meta Quest by @lvonasek in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/1105
* Don't show logged out steam splash when offline by @utkarshdalal in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/1138
* Hide local saves only setting by @utkarshdalal in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/1139


Fixes from 0.9.0-prerelease:
- Updated Wrapper - initial PowerVR (Pixel 10) GPU support - thanks to @sharpy66 and @Pipetto-crypto
- Added "use known config" and automatic best configs for Epic, GOG and Amazon by @unbelievableflavour in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/892
- Added Steam workshop implementation by @Nightwalker743 in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/977
- Added support for Steam game versions/branches by @morganwalkup in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/870
- Added "compatibility" filter by @unbelievableflavour in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/813
- Added downloads & storage manager by @xXJSONDeruloXx and @eredisg in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/878
- Added carousel layout by @xXJSONDeruloXx in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/797
- Fixes for launching from frontends by @jeremybernstein
- Fix Steam cloud saves for games like Cult of the Lamb and Blue Revolver - apply UFS rootoverrides for Windows save paths by @kiequoo in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/839
- Screensaver for download screen OLED protection by @ObfuscatedVoid in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/1017
- fix for games with Steam Input by @kiequoo in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/1026
- Samsung DeX support by @AndreVto in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/793
- Upload achievements in real-time & custom achievement pop-up placements by @phobos665 in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/975
- Fix display of game playtime by @kiequoo in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/957
- Preserve settings on Steam logout by @xXJSONDeruloXx in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/903
- Winlator ludashi effects by @xXJSONDeruloXx in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/803
- Improve boot splash tip readability on dark displays by @nacl-dev in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/823
- Launch games in the correct workingDir, fix some cloud saves and no launches by @kiequoo in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/775
- Reduces boot time on external storage by @giovannygb in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/747
- Fix CursorWindow crash on large Steam libraries by @jeremybernstein in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/961
- add battery temperature metric to performance HUD by @xXJSONDeruloXx in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/991
- Nicer amazon images by @unbelievableflavour in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/1021
- Nicer images for in GOG detail screens by @unbelievableflavour in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/998
- Reduce buggy game calculation size (eg in RE4) by @jeremybernstein in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/929
- Adjust color scheme of the External Display Input (on Thor-type devices) by @MayRedBeWithYou in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/838

And many more:

- Add connector context to XConnectorEpoll logs by @xXJSONDeruloXx in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/869
- Fixed a bug with steam 2017 vc redists by @unbelievableflavour in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/886
- feat: performance hud customizability, adtl params by @xXJSONDeruloXx in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/877
- Fix SD card game detection after crash by @jeremybernstein in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/889
- Added "not logged in" splash screens by @unbelievableflavour in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/844
- Update manifest.json by @utkarshdalal in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/879
- Bugfix: Launch deps should be run in offline mode by @unbelievableflavour in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/898
- fix: allow downloads over VPN connections by @jeremybernstein in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/882
- Fix Steam WebSocket idle disconnects by @jeremybernstein in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/771
- Fix cold-launch intent race, add failure feedback by @jeremybernstein in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/884
- Fix dpad ordinality on dpad that allows opposing directions to be pressed simultaneously by @iobg in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/805
- fix(): update achievement background for better contrast by @phobos665 in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/836
- Moved image fetching to custom games by @unbelievableflavour in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/810
- fix(): silent hill 4 reg fixes by @phobos665 in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/926
- Fix carousel external mouse scrolling and dragging by @xXJSONDeruloXx in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/931
- Support old manifest download size format (Assassin's Creed 1 fix) by @unbelievableflavour in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/924
- Add Steam cloud saves browser shortcut by @xXJSONDeruloXx in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/840
- Feat/perf hud text outline by @xXJSONDeruloXx in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/915
- Added launch argument gamefixes by @unbelievableflavour in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/930
- Fix intent launch edge cases: two-tier snackbar, offline fallback by @jeremybernstein in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/912
- Fix "Resume" button staying after completed download/update by @jeremybernstein in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/923
- fix: show Steam sign-in in menu after logout by @jeremybernstein in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/790
- refactor: poison Toast and migrate to SnackbarManager by @jeremybernstein in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/851
- Skip symlinks in exe search by @unbelievableflavour in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/900
- fix: stabilize carousel cpu perf on idle by @xXJSONDeruloXx in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/968
- Fix expired license filtering without JSON string parsing by @jeremybernstein in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/985
- fix: prevent quick menu controller tab focus bounce by @xXJSONDeruloXx in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/976
- fix: preserve Steam session state on unexpected auth loss by @xXJSONDeruloXx in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/973
- fix: defer intent launches until GOG/Epic/Amazon service is ready by @jeremybernstein in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/987
- feat: allow disabling of cloud saves per game by @xXJSONDeruloXx in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/596
- fix: correct FEX_SMC_CHECKS env var to FEX_SMCCHECKS by @jeremybernstein in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/990
- Make images fill their container for library layout: hero by @unbelievableflavour in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/1003
- feat: add new keyboard QuickMenu navigation keys by @AndreVto in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/946
- Added Ubisoft Connect preinstall step by @unbelievableflavour in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/921
- feat: add Xbox controller style toggle to swap A↔B and X↔Y button icons by @kiequoo in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/958
- fix: verify controller characteristics as detection by @AndreVto in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/972
- Fix ControlsProfile binding deserialization by @Nightwalker743 in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/979
- Use canonical root for dosdevices (imagefs parent safeguard) by @unbelievableflavour in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/1029
- Refactored default Proton downloads to launch deps by @unbelievableflavour in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/1031
- fix: custom game exit quits app instead of returning to library by @jeremybernstein in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/1040
- fix: track axis press state to avoid spurious releases by @jeremybernstein in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/1001
- Fix case-sensitive filesystem creating duplicate directories by @jeremybernstein in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/941
- fix: preserve xconnector waits across suspend interrupts by @xXJSONDeruloXx in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/1033
- fix: Steam cloud save sync fixes by @kiequoo in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/1044
- fix: prevent quick menu tab debounce when controller active by @xXJSONDeruloXx in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/996
- Overlay: show active state on toggle icons, use per-item accent colors by @unbelievableflavour in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/873
- Feat & Fix: Environment variables presets + VKD3D_SHADER_MODEL=6_0 set as default + bug fix by @Catpotatos in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/1104
- fix: add app paths to goldberg config to fix games dlc detection by @joshuatam in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/1098

## New Contributors
* @iobg made their first contribution in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/805
* @sharpy66 made their first contribution in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/904
* @nacl-dev made their first contribution in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/823
* @morganwalkup made their first contribution in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/870
* @MayRedBeWithYou made their first contribution in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/838
* @lvonasek made their first contribution in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/1105

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/compare/v0.8.1...v0.9.0

* fix: prevent quick menu tab debounce when controller active by @xXJSONDeruloXx in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/996

releases.name: v0.8.1
releases.body:
## What's Changed

- Added Steam achievement support!
- Correctly install prerequisites like VCRedist, PhysX, XNA, etc by @unbelievableflavour
- Add quick menu performance HUD overlay by @xXJSONDeruloXx in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/777
- Fix bug for Steam downloads where they get stuck on "Resume" in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/767
- Fix local saves being overwritten with cloud saves if connection lost during gameplay by @xXJSONDeruloXx in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/791
- Fixed infinite booting screens, black screens on boot and improved ability to download contents from our endpoints
- Fixes Edit Container crashes on older Android versions by @Catpotatos in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/753
- Fix external game launches while app is open & avoid pop-ups on external launch by @phobos665 in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/759
- Added container config export/import for all platforms by @unbelievableflavour in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/649
- Added per-game auto-pause/resume settings by @xXJSONDeruloXx in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/746
- Fixed VirGL in Glibc containers - Will enable Mali users to play 2D games in Glibc by @Catpotatos in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/763
- Fixed touchpad input by @AndreVto in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/725
- Added language-support for gen 1 GOG downloader by @unbelievableflavour in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/743
- Added language support for Epic (also shrinks game sizes) by @unbelievableflavour in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/754
- Replace Toast with Compose Snackbar system by @jeremybernstein in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/697
- Show games on internal and external storage at the same time by @jeremybernstein in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/781
- Allow searching for game titles with diacritics removed by @danbruno in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/712
- add fexcore 2603 by @phobos665 in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/723
- remove trim for passwords to fix trailing spaces in some user passwords by @phobos665 in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/736
- Fix: Closing FileInputStream and BufferedReader on listRunningWineProcesses by @giovannygb in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/756
- refactor: deduplicate network connectivity checks by @jeremybernstein in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/648
- Fix app crash in race condition in DownloadInfo ETA by snapshotting speed samples by @unbelievableflavour in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/755
- fix: resume immediately when opening keyboard in manual suspend mode by @xXJSONDeruloXx in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/779
- Translation into Russian by @Denis11212 in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/695

Bugfixes from v0.8.1-prerelease:
* fix: skip achievements generation when Steam not logged in by @jeremybernstein in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/835
* fix: allow intent launches for non-Steam and offline-mode games by @jeremybernstein in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/832
* Added app screen gradient so back button stays visible by @unbelievableflavour in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/843
* Fix/cpu affinity empty selection crash by @xXJSONDeruloXx in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/764
* fix: wait for exit sync before returning to launcher by @xXJSONDeruloXx in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/792
* fix(): Epic name mismatch between game and container ID + added logging for container deletion to catch orphans by @Catpotatos in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/760
* Fix crash on empty depot list (#729) by @jeremybernstein in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/772
* fix: update action shows Resume instead of download progress by @jeremybernstein in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/806
* Updated achievement uploading code to not skip achievements.json when… by @utkarshdalal in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/847
* Cleaned up UI on Portrait screens (on game page) and on small landsca… by @utkarshdalal in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/862
* Consolidated networking code to always attempt Google DNS, should pre… by @utkarshdalal in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/861
* Handle XServerView lifecycle across app sleep by @xXJSONDeruloXx in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/853
* fix: SD card games unrecoverable when external storage toggle off by @jeremybernstein in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/809

## New Contributors
* @Denis11212 made their first contribution in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/695
* @danbruno made their first contribution in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/712

* @giovannygb made their first contribution in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/756

releases.name: v0.8.0
releases.body:
## What's Changed
* [HOTFIX] Added back Reverse Landscape and setting allowed orientations
* Complete UI/UX overhaul by @ObfuscatedVoid , @phobos665, @xXJSONDeruloXx and me (in chronological order)
* Added Amazon games support by @xXJSONDeruloXx 
* Added dynamic sticks for touchscreen controller (left and right sticks will show up on touch) + a new touchscreen preset for strategy games by @Nightwalker743 in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/599
* Improve Cloud Saves for Epic Games by @phobos665 in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/589
* Fixed external mouse by @jeremybernstein and @AndreVto 
* Fix rumble on devices such as Ayn Odin 2 by @kiequoo in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/538
* Various compatibility and bugfixes for GOG by @unbelievableflavour
* Correctly download audio after changing language for Steam games by @joshuatam in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/507
* Correctly download audio after changing language for GOG games by @unbelievableflavour in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/592
* Several bugfixes, including correctly applying FEX preset, crashes with large logs and custom exes, fixing fetching of SteamGridDB images, fixing affinity not being applied, downloading missing proton on first install and more by @jeremybernstein 
* Fixed L2 and R2 being registered as buttons instead of axes
* Pause games on bringing up in-game menu by @xXJSONDeruloXx 
* Added better support for pocket taco/8bitdo flippad type portrait controllers in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/541
* Add new manifest attribute to ensure app is classified as a game - will help with Samsung Game Launcher by @Unnvaldr in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/709
* Added steam offline mode for games like N++
* Update pulseaudio component for fixing loss of audio when pausing by @joshuatam in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/534
* Fixed second-screen keyboard staying visible for AYN Thor by @xXJSONDeruloXx 
* fix(l10n): Refine Spanish translations and fix a small UI bug by @zeedif in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/511
* Add Korean (ko) locale support by @TeamConceptKR in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/512
* Feedback for non-steam games now supported by @phobos665 in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/577
* add toggle for auto-apply known config by @jeremybernstein in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/586
* use header image instead of capsule image if missing for steam games by @silentrald in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/555
* Hotfix for Polish Language to be included in build.gradle.kts by @Petexy in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/529

## New Contributors
* @TeamConceptKR made their first contribution in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/512
* @xXJSONDeruloXx made their first contribution in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/531

* @Nightwalker743 made their first contribution in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/599
* @AndreVto made their first contribution in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/664
* @Unnvaldr made their first contribution in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/709
* @ObfuscatedVoid made their first contribution in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/700

releases.name: v0.7.1
releases.body:
## What's Changed
* Epic library support by @phobos665 
* Added new wrapper - improved support/performance, especially for PowerVR/mali users
* Added in new 8 elite Turnip by default (give me feedback on this one)
* Fixes to compatibility list and applying known configs
* Added ability to download and apply drivers/contents/proton directly in the dropdown, instead of having to manually upload via * settings
* Dual Screen Support by @SapphireRhodonite
* added ability to add drives
* Games now close gracefully when exited (no need to press Back -> Exit)!
* Added Romanian translation by @мххме
* First attempt at Steam Input
* QOL fixes around syncing saves


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/compare/v0.7.0...v0.7.1

releases.name: v0.7.0
releases.body:
## What's Changed
* GOG integration (Alpha) by @phobos665 (honourable mention to @unbelievableflavour) in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/393
* Added DLC management by @joshuatam in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/366
* Denuvo games now work (Persona 5 Royal, Metal Gear Solid V, Dragon Quest, Sonic Forces, Mortal Kombat 1, others confirmed) in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/410
* Steam client auto login (no longer need to log in in the container when Steam client enabled) by @joshuatam in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/411
* Fix for cloud saves not uploading and some other cloud save issues in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/408
* Fix for audio not pausing when app backgrounded by @joshuatam 
* New Box64, wowbox64, fexcore and turnip driver by @phobos665 in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/405
* Make compatibility requests more robust by in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/409
* Save physical controller mapping after updating in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/413
* Italian localization for my fellow italian gamers! <3 by @Ashnar2602 in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/399
* All Ukrainian strings translated by @Scrollname in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/397

* Fixed games that were not working before with Steam Error (eg Hades 2), with help from @Phr3d13

releases.name: v0.6.0
releases.body:
## What's Changed
* Added ability to add custom games by @maaggel
* Show compatibility of games within GameNative, allow applying of known configs for games
* Cleaned up and fixed download issues, estimated time is far more accurate and download UI is better
* Added new wrapper driver, significantly improve compatibility for non-Adreno devices, reduce glitches, increase performance in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/296
* Added Proton 10 as downloadable content, added ability to include custom wine and proton wcps by @phobos665 
* Brought in some new Turnip Drivers and Box64 by @phobos665 in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/294
* Added pull down to refresh gamelist by @maaggel in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/308
* Added beta support for Denuvo
* Added Brazilian Portuguese, Danish and Simplified Chinese translations by @rodrigosiviero, @maaggel, @darkcl, @phobos665 
* Fixed crashes when using external storage external storage by @phobos665 in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/317
* Correctly pause and resume games when app paused or screen turned off by @Phr3d13  in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/322

## New Contributors
* @LossyDragon made their first contribution in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/275
* @darkcl made their first contribution in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/302

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/compare/v0.5.2...v0.6.0
